message:
fix: classify clubanderson PRs/issues as AI in ACCM dashboard (#5889)

Added clubanderson to AI_AUTHORS set so all contributions from this
account are classified as AI (Claude Code), not human. Previously
only the ai-generated label was checked, undercounting AI contributions.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
